biology_rationale: Multi-modal evidence가 marker의 robustness를 강화. 4 layer 동시 support는 cross-modality robustness.
진짜 stage-onset signal은 cohort/layer 간 direction 일치. Cross-cohort + cross-layer voting consensus.
4-Early-pattern framework의 prerequisite. Stage I-onset shape match가 early-detection 가능 조건.
Tissue→serum translation success가 PDAC marker 임상 가치 핵심. Secreted + serum-detectable + direction concord.

RNA weak/artifact여도 protein/scRNA/serum 강하면 rescue. LTBP1 case capture. STRICT eligibility: (1) RNA tier ARTIFACT/OTHER (2) ≥2 other layer GOLD/SILVER (3) direction concordance 필요. HK/plasma penalty는 rescue override 불가.

biology_rationale: HPA/Eisenberg housekeeping list. Score 완전 crush — biology baseline fluctuation을 marker로 오인하지 않게.
Anderson 2002 plasma top-decile (ALB, IGH/IGK, complement, acute-phase). Abundance ≠ marker quality, halve.
Rescue signal cannot override leakage_multiplier. HK gene with rescue eligible features still gets multiplier 0.00.
I² < 50: no penalty. Multi-cohort biology에서 moderate heterogeneity 흔함, early-marker는 cohort composition 민감.
I² 50-70: score penalty 없음, uncertainty만 증가. CI 폭 확장으로 처리.
I² 70-90: soft penalty. LTBP1 max_I²=75%면 0.70 multiplier — rescue signal로 어느 정도 보강 가능.
I² >90: strong penalty. Cohort 간 거의 완전 disagreement → effectively unreliable.
score = positive_score × leakage_multiplier × heterogeneity_multiplier; min-max normalize to [0,1] across atlas.
audit_uncertainty = f(per-cohort SE, max_I2_meta band, missingness across layers, bootstrap on feature normalization). I² 50-70 band의 uncertainty가 score 외에 noted됨.
sample_features: cohort SE, I² band, missingness count, bootstrap N=200
